title: festive briny turkish lamb corn-husk manti
description: a festive, flavorful twist on traditional turkish lamb manti, wrapped in corn husks and infused with genmaicha and ferm-jang for added depth and umami.
instructions: in a large mixing bowl, combine the ground lamb, genmaicha, ferm-jang, salt, and black pepper.
finely chop the onion and garlic, and add to the bowl, mixing well.
cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
prepare the corn husks by soaking them in warm water for 30 minutes.
to assemble the manti, lay a corn husk flat on a work surface, with the wide end facing you.
place about 1/4 cup of the lamb mixture at the center of the corn husk.
fold the sides of the corn husk over the filling, then roll the manti up tightly.
repeat with the remaining corn husks and filling.
place the manti seam-side down in a steamer basket, and steam over boiling water for 10-12 minutes, or until cooked through.
